game.low_water: Your plant is drying out of water

messages.game_over: The magic fades… Your farm rests for now. But with a new dawn, fresh hope will grow again. Please check the game instructions and try again when you're ready!
messages.harvest: Great work today! Your farm flourished under your care — take a well-earned rest and return soon to keep the magic growing.
messages.session_started: Welcome, Wizard! The fields await your touch — sprouts are stirring, and magic hums through the soil. Let's grow something wonderful today!
messages.confirm_claim: Are you sure you want to claim via
messages.available: Airtime / data rewards are available in Nigeria only.
messages.unavailable: This service is not avaialabel in your region
messages.watch_ads: Watch a short enchanted vision (ad) to save your journey and unlock a special reward. The forest remembers those who take the time — let the magic work in your favor!
messages.reques_recieved: Your reward request has been successfully received and is currently being processed. It will be delivered to you once the timer ends!
messages.leaderboard: The Leaderboard is based on the total point user accumulated on the app
messages.seed_info: Select your seed to plant. Each plant has four unique levels.
messages.upgrade_message: Unlock the full magic with Premium — no ads, more rewards, and exclusive perks. The forest favors the bold!
messages.withdrawal_warning: Ooops!!! You don have enough USD balance to takeout, Please play more game and convert your score to USD
messages.convert_warning: Oops!!! You dont have enough token to convert, Please play more game to earn token

plants.stage0: Welcome to a humble start! Magic stirs in the soil. Growth Level 1 started!
plants.stage1: Congratulations on your progress! Your roots grow stronger. Growth Level 2 started!
plants.stage2: You've made it! The forest whispers your name. Growth Level 3 started!
plants.stage3: A true milestone! Enchanted harvest awaits. Growth Level 4 started!

comfirmation.title: Confirmation
comfirmation.delete_account: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
comfirmation.logout: The path winds quiet... Will you step away from your tale, or stay and let the magic linger a little longer?
comfirmation.close_game: Are you sure you want to close the game? You will be redirected to the home screen.
comfirmation.confirm_upgrade: Your account is currently not upgraded, Confirm Payment of {{amount}} to upgrade your account to premium
comfirmation.token_address: Enter your destination address below to takeout your {{amount}} USD balance

inventory.confirm_payment: Confirm payment of {{amount}} in respect of {{purchaseQty}} of {{item}}
